# Retreats And Treks

> Expert-led Himalayan retreats and treks in Uttarakhand, India. Focused on wellness, burnout recovery, and curated mountain journeys.

## Website
https://retreatsandtreks.com

## Core Topics
- Himalayan retreats (wellness, burnout recovery, art retreats)
- Guided treks in Uttarakhand (beginner to high-altitude)
- Trek comparisons and planning guides
- Retreat planning and cost breakdowns

## Key Locations
- Chakrata
- Sankri
- Kedarkantha region
- Har Ki Dun valley
- Brahmatal region
- Dayara Bugyal
- Roopkund region
